---
title: "HANDSON"
author: "M. Haikal Tabrani"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
---

```{r}
library(readxl)
df<-read_xlsx("C:\\Users\\a c e r\\Downloads\\DATA_REGRESI_CLEANEDED (1).xlsx")
df
```

```{r}
summary(df)
```

```{r}
colnames(df) <- c("Ticker", "Y", paste0("X", 1:16))
head(df)
```

```{r}
plot(df$X1, df$Y,
     main = "X1 VS Y",
     xlab = "GPM",
     ylab = "NPM")
```
```{r}
n <- nrow(data)
x <- df$X1
y <- df$Y
```

```{r}
b1 <- (sum(x*y)-sum(x)*sum(y)/n)/(sum(x^2)-(sum(x)^2/n))
b0 <- mean(y)-b1*mean(x)

cat("Koefisien b0:", b0, "\n")  
cat("Koefisien b1:", b1, "\n")
```
```{r}
r <- (sum(x*y)-sum(x)*sum(y)/n)/
sqrt((sum(x^2)-(sum(x)^2/n))*(sum(y^2)-(sum(y)^2/n)))
Koef_det <- r^2
Koef_det
```
